# Phase 3 Review: Conductor Integration

**Date:** April 3, 2026  
**Status:** SUPERSEDED — Conductor OSS removed (April 14, 2026)

This review document covered the Conductor OSS integration implemented in Phase 3. That integration has since been removed from the codebase as it added complexity without providing value in a single-process deployment model.

See the removal plan at `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-14-remove-conductor.md` for details.
